bullets: Architected a Python and FastAPI backend microservice on AWS handling 12M requests/day, cutting p95 latency by 38%.
Led migration of a monolith to Kubernetes using Terraform-managed infrastructure as code, reducing deploy time from 45 min to 6 min.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and Redis caching, saving an estimated $90k/year in compute costs.
Built a Kafka-based event pipeline feeding a Snowflake warehouse, enabling real-time analytics for 200+ internal users.
Mentored 4 engineers and introduced CI/CD quality gates that dropped production incidents by 25%.
Implemented a Django REST API and integrated Stripe billing, sustaining 99.9% uptime.
Raised automated test coverage from 40% to 85% across the core service.
Developed React and TypeScript front-end features used by 50k+ monthly active users.

projects.title: OpenMetrics Dashboard
bullets: Built an open-source observability dashboard with Go, React, and Docker that reached 1.2k GitHub stars.
Implemented a Go collector exporting 60+ Prometheus metrics with <2% overhead.

projects.title: ResumeForge
bullets: Created a deterministic Python and FastAPI JSON-to-LaTeX resume generator with ATS-aware formatting.
Automated one-page output sizing by adding a pdflatex auto-fit compiler loop.

summary: Prioritized Python and FastAPI microservices on AWS, Kubernetes and Terraform infrastructure as code, PostgreSQL and Redis optimization, and Kafka-to-Snowflake event pipelines. Preserved all employers, titles, dates, and source metrics while reordering and tightening content for backend relevance and removing the least relevant accessibility bullet. Applied BOLDING OFF and omitted profile_summary as required by SUMMARY OFF.
